mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, phone, detail, is_default, create_time FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_address(user_id, name, phone, detail, is_default, create_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{detail}, #{isDefault}, #{createTime})
